ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "roi" TEXT /* Region of Interest (ROI) */,
  "centroid_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the centroid in micrometers */,
  "centroid_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the centroid in micrometers */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient from whom the sample was taken */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of biological sample (e.g., blood, tissue, etc.) */,
  "staining_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for staining the sample */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Identifier for the technician who collected the sample */,
  "stored_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nucleus_metrics" (
  "nucleus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nucleus measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample ID */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the nucleus */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the nucleus */,
  "circularity" REAL /* Circularity of the nucleus */,
  "max_caliper" REAL /* Maximum caliper of the nucleus */,
  "min_caliper" REAL /* Minimum caliper of the nucleus */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the nucleus */,
  "nucleus_volume" REAL /* Volume of the nucleus */,
  "nucleus_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the nucleus (e.g., spherical, ellipsoidal, irregular) */,
  "nucleus_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the nucleus (e.g., smooth, granular) */,
  "nucleus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the nucleus stain */,
  "nucleus_area_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the nucleus area in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nucleus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nucleus_OD_metrics" (
  "od_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the OD metrics */,
  "nucleus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nucleus ID */,
  "hematoxylin_mean" REAL /* Mean optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "hematoxylin_sum" REAL /* Sum of optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "hematoxylin_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "hematoxylin_max" REAL /* Maximum optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "hematoxylin_min" REAL /* Minimum optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "eosin_mean" REAL /* Mean optical density for Eosin */,
  "eosin_sum" REAL /* Sum of optical density for Eosin */,
  "eosin_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of optical density for Eosin */,
  "eosin_max" REAL /* Maximum optical density for Eosin */,
  "eosin_min" REAL /* Minimum optical density for Eosin */,
  "hematoxylin_median" REAL /* Median optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "eosin_median" REAL /* Median optical density for Eosin */,
  "hematoxylin_percentiles" TEXT /* Percentiles of optical density for Hematoxylin */,
  "eosin_percentiles" TEXT /* Percentiles of optical density for Eosin */,
  "staining_uniformity" REAL /* Measure of the uniformity of the staining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("od_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_OD_metrics_nucleus_id FOREIGN KEY ("nucleus_id") REFERENCES nucleus_metrics ("nucleus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_metrics" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample ID */,
  "cell_area" REAL /* Area of the cell */,
  "cell_perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the cell */,
  "cell_circularity" REAL /* Circularity of the cell */,
  "cell_max_caliper" REAL /* Maximum caliper of the cell */,
  "cell_min_caliper" REAL /* Minimum caliper of the cell */,
  "cell_eosin_mean" REAL /* Mean optical density for Eosin in the cell */,
  "cell_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cell */,
  "cell_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the cell */,
  "cell_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the cell */,
  "cell_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the cell stain */,
  "cell_area_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the cell area in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cytoplasm_metrics" (
  "cytoplasm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cytoplasm metrics */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell ID */,
  "cytoplasm_eosin_mean" REAL /* Mean optical density for Eosin in the cytoplasm */,
  "cytoplasm_eosin_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of optical density for Eosin in the cytoplasm */,
  "cytoplasm_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cytoplasm */,
  "cytoplasm_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the cytoplasm */,
  "cytoplasm_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the cytoplasm */,
  "cytoplasm_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the cytoplasm stain */,
  "cytoplasm_area_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the cytoplasm area in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cytoplasm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cytoplasm_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_metrics ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nucleus_cell_ratio" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nucleus to cell area ratio */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample ID */,
  "nucleus_area" REAL /* Area of the nucleus */,
  "cell_area_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of nucleus to cell area */,
  "nucleus_volume_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of nucleus volume to cell volume */,
  "nucleus_shape_similarity" REAL /* Similarity in shape between nucleus and cell */,
  "nucleus_texture_similarity" REAL /* Similarity in texture between nucleus and cell */,
  "nucleus_intensity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of nucleus intensity to cell intensity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_cell_ratio_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
